displaySummary.zh: 以棋牌游戏为试验场：搜索、学习与规划的演进
displaySummary.en: Game AI as a Testbed for Search, Learning and Planning

displayDescription.zh: Chinook 把游戏 AI 从竞技对弈推进到数学求解。阿尔伯塔大学团队结合开局库、深层 alpha-beta 搜索、专家评估和庞大残局数据库，最终证明跳棋在完美对弈下结果为和棋。
displayDescription.en: Chinook pushed game AI from competitive play toward mathematical solution. The University of Alberta team combined opening books, deep alpha-beta search, expert evaluation, and enormous endgame databases, eventually proving that perfect play in checkers leads to a draw.

description.en: Science record for the weak solution of checkers and Chinook's endgame database work.
description.zh: 《科学》 记录：跳棋弱求解与 Chinook 残局数据库工作。

description.en: Fast checkers evolution slot connecting opening search to solved endgame-table evidence.
description.zh: 连接开局搜索与已求解残局表证据的跳棋快速演化槽位。

license.en: Locally generated exhibition clip from curated game-state data; no external broadcast footage is reused.
license.zh: 由策展棋局状态数据本地生成的展览短片；不复用外部转播画面。

usage.zh: 可播放的棋局状态演化模块

html.zh: 跳棋足够复杂，可以挑战搜索算法；同时结构足够明确，适合长期构建残局数据库。
html.en: Checkers was complex enough to challenge search algorithms but structured enough for decades of endgame database construction.

html.zh: Chinook 将前向搜索与已求解残局表结合，使程序能把当前选择连接到被证明的终局结果。
html.en: Chinook paired forward search with solved endgame tables, letting the program connect current choices to proven late-game outcomes.

html.zh: 专家通常把 Chinook 视为游戏求解研究和高性能搜索的里程碑。它的长期影响在于展示专家评估、alpha-beta 搜索、开局知识和残局数据库如何结合并逼近完美对弈。
html.en: Experts generally treat Chinook as a landmark in game-solving research and high-performance search. Its long-term legacy is showing how expert evaluation, alpha-beta search, opening knowledge, and endgame databases can combine to approach perfect play.

notes.zh: 由 legacy generated milestone 批量生成的 variant；展示层默认不覆盖 legacy。
notes.en: Variant batch-generated from the generated legacy milestone; presentation does not override legacy by default.
